The level set of \(f(x, y; a)=(x^{2}+y^{2}-x)^{2}-a^{2}(x^{2}+y^{2})=0\) is a curve called a Limacon 2 ---we treat \(a\) as a parameter.
  • Identify the point(s) where this curve intersects the \(x\) axis and examine whether Theorem 4.5.8 is applicable at the point---the result may depend on the value of the parameter \(a\text{.}\)
  • Note that \((0, 0)\) is a solution for any choice of \(a\text{.}\) Examine the set of solutions near \((0, 0)\) for different values of the parameter \(a\text{.}\)
Hint.
